mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_test_answer (student_id, test_id, question_id, answer, score, status, submit_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{testId}, #{questionId}, #{answer}, #{score}, #{status}, NOW())

INSERT INTO student_test_answer (student_id, test_id, question_id, answer, score, status, submit_time) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.testId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.answer}, #{item.score}, #{item.status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_test_answer WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY student_id, question_id
SELECT * FROM student_test_answer WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY question_id

SELECT a.student_id, u.username, COUNT(*) as total_questions, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 1 THEN a.score ELSE 0 END) as auto_score, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 2 THEN a.score ELSE 0 END) as manual_score, MAX(a.submit_time) as submit_time, MIN(a.status) as min_status FROM student_test_answer a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.student_id = u.uid WHERE a.test_id = #{testId} GROUP BY a.student_id, u.username ORDER BY a.student_id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM student_test_answer WHERE test_id = #{testId}
SELECT * FROM student_test_answer WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY test_id, question_id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM student_test_answer WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND status = 0
